description: Velop AX4200 WiFi 6 System V1 — CVE-2019-16340 auth bypass for initial flash

linksys-jnap-cve.description: CVE-2019-16340 auth bypass: use JNAP SetAdminPassword with 5-digit recovery pin from sticker to set admin password, then upload factory image via /jcgi/ endpoint (port 80 or 52000). Recovery pin is required — empty/missing resetCode returns ErrorInvalidResetCode. Dual partitions — must flash both.

tested_hardware.notes: Flashed 2 units. Partition 1 via port 80 or 52000 /jcgi/ upload, partition 2 via SSH mtd write to alt_kernel. Recovery pin required on both.
